level.setting: A crumbling, neon-lit megastructure suspended above the city cloud layer

pickup.name: Overload Module
pickup.effect: Allows the Pulse Cutter to stun mechanical enemies for 3 seconds

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone triggers the emergency blast doors to open

pickup.name: Encrypted Access Code
pickup.effect: Unlocks the command override console in the boss chamber

encounters.trigger: Eliminating the guerilla enables the lift to the executive floor

pickup.name: System Override Chip
pickup.effect: Can bypass the shielding of the central mainframe boss

encounters.trigger: Defeating the guard shuts down the boss's security perimeter

boss.name: Aegis Mainframe Core
boss.victory_condition: Inject the System Override Chip into the central terminal

level.objective: Infiltrate the Neo-Kyoto data vault and retrieve the encryption key to stop the city-wide blackout.

level.setting: A decaying, rain-slicked mega-city built over a sprawling digital network.

encounters.hazard: Overloaded electrical cables sparking on wet pavement

pickup.name: EMP Grenade
pickup.effect: Temporarily disables cybernetic shielding on organic enemies

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the droid triggers a lockdown alarm, forcing entry into the Maintenance Tunnels.

encounters.hazard: Unstable ventilation shafts venting toxic steam

pickup.name: Encrypted Access Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the firewall protecting the mainframe reactor core

encounters.trigger: The samurai collapses against a terminal, accidentally uploading a virus that opens the path to the Data Core.

enemy.name: Glitch-Shadow Assassin
enemy.weakness: Encrypted Access Key (used to destabilize its projection field)

encounters.hazard: Digital floor panels collapsing into an infinite code void

pickup.name: Neural Overclock Stim
pickup.effect: Doubles attack speed for 10 seconds

encounters.trigger: The defeat of the assassin destabilizes the core's final safety protocol, summoning the main boss.

boss.name: Sentient Firewall Entity
boss.victory_condition: Overload the core by injecting the Encrypted Access Key during the final phase

level.objective: Infiltrate the Neo-Kyoto Datavault and purge the core memory of the ruling AI.
level.reward: Digital Freedom and a permanent 'Ghost-Walk' stealth ability upgrade.

enemy.name: Security Drone Type-A
enemy.weakness: Direct impact from Overcharged Capacitor Gauntlet

pickup.name: EMP Emitter
pickup.effect: Temporarily disables electronic shields

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone activates the elevator to the server farm.

pickup.name: Liquid Nitrogen Canister
pickup.effect: Freezes complex machinery

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentry unlocks the biometric scanner to the inner sanctum.

pickup.name: Override Keycard
pickup.effect: Disables the central containment field

encounters.trigger: Downing the mech allows access to the boss chamber.

boss.name: The Architect
boss.victory_condition: Hack the primary terminal to shut down the mainframe

level.objective: Infiltrate the data vault and retrieve the sentient AI core.

level.setting: A decaying, rain-slicked megacity at midnight

encounters.hazard: Flickering holographic advertisements that obscure vision

pickup.name: Stasis Battery
pickup.effect: Freezes enemies in a small radius for 3 seconds

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone triggers the security gate to open

encounters.hazard: Electrified water puddles causing periodic damage

pickup.name: Temporal Prism
pickup.effect: Reflects projectile attacks back at the source

encounters.trigger: Defeating the guard causes the elevator override switch to activate

encounters.hazard: Gravity shifts that pull the player towards the ceiling

pickup.name: Chronos Key
pickup.effect: Reveals hidden weak points on mechanical entities

encounters.trigger: The assassin's demise unlocks the heavy blast doors to the boss arena

boss.name: Epoch Sentinel
boss.victory_condition: Stabilize the reactor by exposing the core

level.objective: Infiltrate the Neo-Tokyo server hub and stabilize the fractured timeline

encounters.hazard: Leaking cryo-fluid pipes causing slow movement

pickup.name: Volatile Isotope
pickup.effect: Temporarily grants explosive properties to chemical attacks

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the drone unlocks the security bulkhead to the laboratory

pickup.name: High-Density Lead Vial
pickup.effect: Increases armor penetration for chemical projectiles

encounters.trigger: The Stalker's death triggers an emergency lockdown protocol requiring a keycard

encounters.hazard: Toxic spores that drain health over time

pickup.name: Data-Core Fragment
pickup.effect: Unlocks the boss's bio-mechanical shield frequency

encounters.trigger: Fungal remains clear the path to the central control chamber where the boss resides

boss.name: Synthetica the Neural-Weaver
boss.victory_condition: Overload her neural-link before she corrupts your memory banks

level.objective: Infiltrate the bio-sludge research facility and synthesize the cure for the neural-rot virus

enemy.name: Rust-Bot Sentinel
enemy.weakness: Exposed circuitry vulnerable to Monofilament Dagger

pickup.name: EMP Grenade
pickup.effect: Temporarily disables electronic defenses

encounters.trigger: After defeating the Sentinel, the blast door to the cooling chamber unlocks.

enemy.name: Data-Husk Scavenger
enemy.weakness: Overwhelmed by electromagnetic pulses from the EMP Grenade

pickup.name: Corrosive Acid Vial
pickup.effect: Melts high-density armor plating

encounters.trigger: Upon looting the Scavenger, the central server lift activates.

enemy.name: Corporate Enforcer Unit
enemy.weakness: Soft armor joints susceptible to Corrosive Acid Vial

pickup.name: System Override Keycard
pickup.effect: Disables the central core lockdown shielding

encounters.trigger: Using the keycard on the terminal initiates the final boss sequence.

boss.name: Aegis Prime Protocol
boss.weakness: Vulnerable only when the System Override Keycard is slotted into the core interface
boss.victory_condition: Hack the primary terminal while dodging automated turret fire

level.objective: Infiltrate the derelict server farm and retrieve the encrypted core before the security purge activates.

pickup.name: Conductive Foil Hat
pickup.effect: Increases damage resistance and amplifies static charge

encounters.trigger: Defeating the scrapper activates the security elevator to the upper rooftops.

encounters.hazard: Floating holographic billboards that distract the player

pickup.name: Super-Saturated Cloud Canister
pickup.effect: Allows for localized weather control

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone triggers a digital bridge leading to the boss's penthouse.

pickup.name: Master Override Keycard
pickup.effect: Opens the main vault door

encounters.trigger: Winning the dance-battle encounter unlocks the boss fight arena.

boss.name: Baron of Bytes
boss.victory_condition: Disable the Baron's power grid during the storm

level.objective: Retrieve the stolen Glitter-Cloud Core to restore the city's neon-party atmosphere.

pickup.name: Magnetic Ore Shard
pickup.effect: Increases damage against metallic enemies

encounters.trigger: Defeating the drone aligns the first conduit, activating the elevator to the server rooftop.

pickup.name: Resonance Tuning Fork
pickup.effect: Stabilizes frequencies to reveal hidden energy nodes

encounters.trigger: Clearing the guardian initiates the reboot sequence of the central server, unlocking the spire gate.

pickup.name: Prismatic Keystone
pickup.effect: Essential component to overload the main core

encounters.trigger: Destroying the sentinel grants access to the Apex Nexus core room.

boss.name: Architect of Quietude
boss.victory_condition: Overload the core by inserting the Prismatic Keystone

level.objective: Restore the digital ley lines within the Neo-Tokyo vertical garden district.
